title: bourreria baccata
intro: Bourreria baccata, also known as the bushwillow or yellow bushwillow, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bourreria baccata include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make herbal preparations for its medicinal and health benefits.
